description_long: This pumping station is a large, rectangular industrial facility with a flat roof and robust concrete walls. The central feature is a circular open basin or tank, likely for water or wastewater processing, surrounded by metal railings and walkways. Multiple access points, including doors and stairways, are visible along the perimeter, and the structure is bordered by paved paths and grassy areas. The roof and exterior walls are equipped with several mechanical components, such as pipes, pumps, and possibly ventilation units. A fenced area and a secondary building or annex are attached to one side, likely housing control equipment or offices. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality, typical of municipal or industrial infrastructure.
description: A large, rectangular concrete pumping station with a central circular basin, metal railings, and multiple access points, surrounded by paved and grassy areas. The structure features mechanical components, a fenced annex, and a utilitarian industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, central circular basin, and primary access doors with visible railings and mechanical equipment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the annexed building, fenced area, and paved driveway, with less visibility of the central basin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, additional access points, and the full extent of the annex and fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main entrance, paved approach, and the layout of the internal walkways and mechanical features.
attribute_security_fencing: metal bar fencing, approximately 2 meters high, partially enclosing the annex and paved area
